name: catherine@dscc.org
subject: The 45th President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Today Donald Trump was sworn in as President. But it also marks the day grassroots Democrats made themselves heard like never before... [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/trump-takes-office?refcode=DPE-20170120-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---
**We have the power to remember today differently, Friend.**

Yes, today Donald Trump became the 45th President of the United States -- his inaugural address confirming a cynical dismissal of our progress and promise to divide. And yes, the White House officially made clear efforts to repeal healthcare reform and gut our climate agreements.

But today also marks when the people made themselves heard. Already, thousands of grassroots Democrats have stepped up with donations to fight the Trump agenda.

[**Friend, we 're on track to hit our $150,000 goal and make a big statement in the first 72 hours of Donald Trump's presidency. With every $1 making a difference to fight back, can we count on you to pitch in?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/trump-takes-office?refcode=DPE-20170120-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thank you for standing with us,
Catherine Algeri
DSCC Director of Marketing

\------------------
Forwarded message:
From: URGENT ALERT (via DSCC)
Date: Friday, January 20, 2017
Subject: Before Trump is sworn in (urgent)

Friend -- In just a few hours, Donald Trump will be sworn in as the 45th President of the United States.

The time to dread this moment is over. With Trump and his allies making no secret of the damaging changes they're about to unleash, it's on us to prepare and fight back.

**That 's why we're launching a $150,000 grassroots goal to send a message to Trump in the first 72 hours of his presidency. Friend, with every $1 helping us push back, can we count on you to pitch in?**

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/trump-takes-office?refcode=DPE-20170120-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&employer=&amount=1")

[Pitch in $5 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/trump-takes-office?refcode=DPE-20170120-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&employer=&amount=5")

[Pitch in $15 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/trump-takes-office?refcode=DPE-20170120-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&employer=&amount=15")

[Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/trump-takes-office?refcode=DPE-20170120-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&employer=&amount=25")

[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/trump-takes-office?refcode=DPE-20170120-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&employer=&amount=35")

[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/trump-takes-office?refcode=DPE-20170120-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Trump may have won the electoral college, but his three million deficit in the popular vote proves there is no mandate to impose his agenda.

**So starting today,_any threat that undermines our democracy cannot be met with complacency_ \-- whether we challenge Trump's conflicts of interests, his Cabinet full of billionaires, or the extremism that put him in the White House.**

[**But only your immediate support can provide the resources it 'll take to push back, Friend. Will you pitch in whatever you can to hit our $150,000 grassroots goal and send a message to Trump as soon as he takes office?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/trump-takes-office?refcode=DPE-20170120-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thanks for standing with us,
Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954edf0/2b07114c/46fb4086/7369a743/1753558001/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954edf0/2b07114c/46fb4086/7369a742/1753558001/VEsHAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954edf0/2b07114c/46fb4086/7369a7bd/1753558001/VEsHAg/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: Donna Brazile
subject: We're getting ready for anything
body:
Let's get to work.
---
**Pitch in $3 or more to help Democrats fight back against the Trump administration and Republicans in Congress.

** **[PITCH IN](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0b9/4067b0a/23dab2dfa/7e78c846/230500270/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+PITCH+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170121_db_nd&source=em_20170121_db_nd")**
I wish I could tell you exactly what to expect now that Donald Trump is president.

But Donald says one thing and does another. Sometimes it doesn't even take a whole day before a policy position he's announced gets reversed.

There's no way to predict what he'll tweet in the middle of the night -- or who he'll attack.

He has chosen to fill his Cabinet with people so outrageously unqualified that some don't even know what the agency they've been picked to run does.

So we have to be ready for anything. That's not an exaggeration -- we can't be sure what the real-world impact of Donald's dangerous unpredictability will be.

I know that Democrats have what it takes to fight back, no matter what comes our way. It's been a while, but I still remember what had to be done the last time there was a Republican president and Congress.

But it's going to take a greater commitment to our country's guiding principles and our party's values -- from all of us. So today I'm asking you to chip in $3 or whatever you can and stand with us.

**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0b9/4067b0a/23dab2dfa/7e78c847/230500270/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2017-Membership1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170121_db_nd&source=em_20170121_db_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0b9/4067b0a/23dab2dfa/7e78c844/230500270/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2017-Membership1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170121_db_nd&source=em_20170121_db_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0b9/4067b0a/23dab2dfa/7e78c845/230500270/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2017-Membership1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170121_db_nd&source=em_20170121_db_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0b9/4067b0a/23dab2dfa/7e78c842/230500270/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2017-Membership1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170121_db_nd&source=em_20170121_db_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0b9/4067b0a/23dab2dfa/7e78c843/230500270/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2017-Membership1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170121_db_nd&source=em_20170121_db_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0b9/4067b0a/23dab2dfa/7e78c840/230500270/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2017-Membership1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170121_db_nd&source=em_20170121_db_nd")
** Thank you for everything you do to support this party, for being a part of this movement. As we prepare for what's to come, I hope you take a minute to remember all the good we've done in the past eight years under President Obama. And I hope that gets you fired up to keep fighting -- I know I am.

Donna

Donna Brazile
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0b9/4067b0a/23dab2dfa/7e78c841/230500270/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170121_db_nd&source=em_20170121_db_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0b9/4067b0a/23dab2dfa/7e78c84e/230500270/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170121_db_nd&source=em_20170121_db_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0b9/4067b0a/23dab2dfa/7e78c84f/230500270/VEsHBQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170121_db_nd&source=em_20170121_db_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0b9/4067b0a/23dab2dfa/7e78c84c/230500270/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170121_db_nd&source=em_20170121_db_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Jessica O'Connell, EMILY's List
subject: FWD: Introducing the Stop Trump Fund >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c71f5/24c69fd9/fbddad61/18ee06ef/542641452/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE128N_digital_email_20170121_Inaugurationkick_n-all&source=WQEFE128N_digital_email_20170121_Inaugurationkick_n-all")
---

Peter,

Like Stephanie said, the next four years will be tough to grapple with.

But I _know_ that women and their allies won't back down.

Just a day into the Trump administration I'm already seeing the strength of our movement as hundreds of thousands of us gather across the country to march. But the work of the resistance is just beginning.

We plan to be there every step of the way.

**Donate $3 today to our Stop Trump Fund to stand up to Trump's dangerous agenda:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Stop-Trump-Fund](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c71f5/24c69fd9/fbddad61/18ee06e8/542641452/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170120_email_Inauguration?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgStopTrumpFund&utm_campaign=WQEFE128N_digital_email_20170121_Inaugurationkick_n-all&source=WQEFE128N_digital_email_20170121_Inaugurationkick_n-all")**

Thank you,

Jess O'Connell
Executive Director, EMILY's List

_\-----------Original Message----------
From: Stephanie Schriock, EMILY's List
Sent: Fri, Jan 20, 2017 at 2:19 p.m._

Peter,

Donald Trump just took the oath of office to become the 45th President of the United States.

That's a hard sentence to write, and an even harder reality to grapple with.

We now have a president who is set on repealing Obamacare and ready to sign anti-choice legislation into law. We don't know all President Trump and his fellow Republicans have planned, but one thing is clear: the consequences of this presidency will be felt far and wide.

We have to stand together now more than ever before.

**[Donate $3 today to our Stop Trump Fund to fight back together against attacks on choice, women, and families.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c71f5/24c69fd9/fbddad61/18ee06e9/542641452/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170120_email_Inauguration?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+Donate+3+today+to+our+Stop+Trump+Fund+to&utm_campaign=WQEFE128N_digital_email_20170121_Inaugurationkick_n-all&source=WQEFE128N_digital_email_20170121_Inaugurationkick_n-all")**

We have fought too long and hard to let all of our progress be destroyed by Trump and his allies.

We're not going to return to an era of back alley abortions, we won't let Republicans dismantle Obamacare which has helped 20 million Americans get health insurance, and we sure as hell won't let them dictate whether women have access to the health care they need.

Today, we need to renew our vow to fight for progress. And with risks this high, sitting on the sidelines is simply not an option.

**Donate $3 today to the Stop Trump Fund to fight back:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Stop-Trump-Fund](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c71f5/24c69fd9/fbddad61/18ee06ea/542641452/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170120_email_Inauguration?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgStopTrumpFund&utm_campaign=WQEFE128N_digital_email_20170121_Inaugurationkick_n-all&source=WQEFE128N_digital_email_20170121_Inaugurationkick_n-all")**

Thanks,

Stephanie Schriock
President, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c71f5/24c69fd9/fbddad61/18ee06eb/542641452/VEsD/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170120_email_Inauguration?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=WQEFE128N_digital_email_20170121_Inaugurationkick_n-all&source=WQEFE128N_digital_email_20170121_Inaugurationkick_n-all")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c71f5/24c69fd9/fbddad61/18ee06e4/542641452/VEsA/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQEFE128N_digital_email_20170121_Inaugurationkick_n-all&source=WQEFE128N_digital_email_20170121_Inaugurationkick_n-all") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c71f5/24c69fd9/fbddad61/18ee06e5/542641452/VEsB/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE128N_digital_email_20170121_Inaugurationkick_n-all&source=WQEFE128N_digital_email_20170121_Inaugurationkick_n-all"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c71f5/24c69fd9/fbddad61/18ee06e6/542641452/VEsO/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE128N_digital_email_20170121_Inaugurationkick_n-all&source=WQEFE128N_digital_email_20170121_Inaugurationkick_n-all"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

Donate $3 today to our Stop Trump Fund to stand up to Trump's dangerous agenda: "" Thank you, Jess O'Connell Executive Director, EMILY's List \-----------Original Message---------- From: Stephanie Schriock, EMILY's List Sent: Fri, Jan 20, 2017 at 2:19 p.m. Peter, Donald Trump just took the oath of office to become the 45th President of the United States. That's a hard sentence to write, and an even harder reality to grapple with. We now have a president who is set on repealing Obamacare and ready to sign anti-choice legislation into law. We don't know all President Trump and his fellow Republicans have planned, but one thing is clear: the consequences of this presidency will be felt far and wide. We have to stand together now more than ever before. "" We have fought too long and hard to let all of our progress be destroyed by Trump and his allies. We're not going to return to an era of back alley abortions, we won't let Republicans dismantle Obamacare which has helped 20 million Americans get health insurance, and we sure as hell won't let them dictate whether women have access to the health care they need. Today, we need to renew our vow to fight for progress. And with risks this high, sitting on the sidelines is simply not an option. Donate $3 today to the Stop Trump Fund to fight back: "" Thanks, Stephanie Schriock President, EMILY's List "" | EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office. | Paid for by EMILY's List "" and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email "". We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe "". Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Women's rights are on us, everyone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
Today, I am proud to join thousands of Granite Staters in Concord and share a simple message: women's rights are fundamental, and they are non-negotiable.
I know that you probably share these values, so whether you're attending a march or rally near you or showing your support from home, I'm grateful to have you on the right side of history.
These next few years are going to be challenging, and in times of uncertainty, standing up for what is right is on each and every one of us.
[**That's why I'm asking you to please add your name to let the new administration know that we will not stand for policies that roll back the decades of progress we have achieved for women.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd0e/2a380d31/142006fb/fed860/1835507073/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://petitions.signforgood.com/standupforwomen?code=hassan&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201701-womensmarch-ja")
Thank you for being there, and thank you for not staying silent.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd0e/2a380d31/142006fb/fed861/1835507073/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDEyMV93b21lbnNqYTJfbmgiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20170121_womensja2_nh&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd0e/2a380d31/142006fb/fed862/1835507073/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Trump=20HQ?=
subject: Congratulate Trump and Pence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Let Trump and Pence know you’re proud. |

Friend, It’s finally here. Yesterday Donald J. Trump and Mike Pence were sworn in as our nation’s President and Vice President. What started as one man’s belief that our country could be great again turned into a major movement because of supporters like you. And now, before President Trump and Vice President Pence begin their First 100 Days agenda, we want to present them with a card signed by their biggest supporters. Friend, add your name to our congratulations card we will be presenting to President Trump and Vice President Pence. Donald Trump’s message inspired hope in millions of people who had given up on D.C. politicians. Though we won this historic election, Donald Trump and Mike Pence still need your support. Being President and Vice President of the United States is a daunting task, so we want to make sure they know we have their backs. Show the President and Vice President that you are 100% behind them by signing this card of support. Thank you. P.S. There isn’t much time before we’re going to share the card with President Trump and Vice President Pence, Friend. Make sure your name is on the top of the card by signing right now.
SIGN THE CARD

Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eccba4KdBAHQ1kCIhWgaCUX7DRMN6aaaaCUX7BMIHPTpa?s=4@685-z&g=brukjngu49_eoYkj.emo&j=p&v=
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of the Republican National Committee's online community. If you have any questions, concerns, or thoughts on the Republican Party, just click here to send us a message! If you'd like more information on the GOP platform or to volunteer, visit gop.com. Getting emails from the RNC is one of the best ways to stay up-to-date on our fight to take back the White House, but if you really want to scale back, click here to receive less email or click here to unsubscribe Or unsubscribe by email. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the GOP on Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram. Thank you for all that you do to help elect a conservative president.

Friend, add your name to our congratulations card we will be presenting to President Trump and Vice President Pence.

This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: historic event
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
President Trump and Congressional Republicans have a clear agenda for Trump's first 100 days: | Katherine and I were proud to join many of you and the hundreds of thousands of other Americans who made their voices heard today at the D.C. Women's March.

This historic event is just a first step in the fight for our shared values. [](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b2f/70cdc2ba/4744c642/39793ad/2181898359/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/VanHollenForMD/posts/10154279426986732?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em012117&source=em012117")
Each of us has a powerful role in our democracy -- if we participate. Now is the time to get off the side lines and march onto the field!

I promise to be on the front lines fighting with you every day to stand up for women's rights, civil rights and human rights and to make sure that our country does not move backwards in the weeks and months ahead.

Chris

**[Take a look at more photos from the march on Facebook](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b2f/70cdc2ba/4744c642/39793aa/2181898359/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/VanHollenForMD/posts/10154279426986732?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Take+a+look+at+more+photos+from+the+marc&utm_campaign=em012117&source=em012117")**
---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

[www.vanhollen.org/donate](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b2f/70cdc2ba/4744c642/39793ab/2181898359/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vanhollen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+wwwvanhollenorgdonate&utm_campaign=em012117&source=em012117")

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b2f/70cdc2ba/4744c642/39793a8/2181898359/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em012117&source=em012117") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.
clean_body: President Trump and Congressional Republicans have a clear agenda for Trump's first 100 days: | Katherine and I were proud to join many of you and the hundreds of thousands of other Americans who made their voices heard today at the D.C. Women's March. This historic event is just a first step in the fight for our shared values. "" Each of us has a powerful role in our democracy -- if we participate. Now is the time to get off the side lines and march onto the field! I promise to be on the front lines fighting with you every day to stand up for women's rights, civil rights and human rights and to make sure that our country does not move backwards in the weeks and months ahead. Chris "" Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate "" We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. "" if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Ben Jealous, Our Revolution
subject: Today, the resistance becomes real
body:
We have an opportunity to send a powerful message to Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Today, the resistance becomes real.
Our Revolution members, like me and my children, have flooded into the nation's capital with hundreds of thousands of our allies for The Women's March. Even more are marching in 600 places across the county.
We are here to stand up for the equality of our sisters, daughters, mothers and grandmothers. We are here to lift our voices for economic justice and racial justice. We are here to unite against hatred, discrimination, and xenophobia.
Today we remind ourselves we are the heart of the majority of voters who cast their ballots against this President and the super-majority of Americans who disapprove of his leadership.
In other words, now is the time to stand strong and push forward.
We must heed Bernie's call to unite and stop cuts to Medicaid, Medicare and Obamacare.
We must follow in the footsteps of Georgia Democrats who have built a strong grassroots party in the heart of the Deep South and launched Georgia Resists to fight suppression with mobilization.
From Southern California to Northern Texas, rural Iowa to suburban Maryland, inner-city Chicago to small town Vermont Our Revolution meetings are brimming with activists ready to win real victories in real time for all our families.
We are ready to keep winning the fight for a $15 minimum wage. We are ready to stop fracking from coast to coast. We are already building the movement that will end college debt. We can still end mass incarceration faster than most think is possible.
But winning victories requires building power.
In our democracy there are only two types: organized money and organized people. Now the people can beat money every time, but we must be organized.
Please encourage your friends to join Our Revolution by signing up at **[OurRevolution.com](https://ourrevolution.com/ "https://ourrevolution.com/")** to become part of the millions who say #NotMeUs. As our board has decided, membership in Our Revolution will always be open.
Trump's support is sinking. Our meetings are overflowing. Trump had his day yesterday. We will have ours tomorrow.
Let's all pull together and get it done.
Yours for victory,
Ben
Ben Jealous
Board Member
Our Revolution

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").
